source_note: Control identifiers and family names are from NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5, a U.S. Government publication in the public domain. Descriptions below are condensed summaries written for this demo and are not the official control text.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Establish, document, and manage information system accounts: define account types, assign owners, require approvals to create accounts, and review accounts periodically for continued need.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Grant users and processes only the access strictly required to accomplish assigned tasks, and restrict use of privileged accounts and functions.

controls.title: Remote Access
controls.description: Authorize, monitor, and control remote access methods, and apply protections such as encryption to remote connections to the organization's systems.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.description: Identify the events the system must log, coordinate the selection of auditable events across the organization, and review and update the logged event set over time.

controls.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.description: Review and analyze audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity and report findings to designated personnel.

controls.title: Literacy Training and Awareness
controls.description: Provide security and privacy awareness training to system users, including recognition of social engineering and reporting of suspicious behavior, on hire and periodically thereafter.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: Develop, document, and maintain a current baseline configuration of the system and review and update it as part of system changes.

controls.title: System Component Inventory
controls.description: Develop and maintain an accurate inventory of system components, including the information needed for tracking and reporting.

controls.title: System Backup
controls.description: Conduct backups of user-level and system-level information and protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of backup information.

controls.title: System Recovery and Reconstitution
controls.description: Provide for the recovery and reconstitution of the system to a known state after a disruption, compromise, or failure.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that identity with processes acting on their behalf.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.description: Manage system authenticators, including initial distribution, complexity and rotation requirements, and protection of credentials such as passwords and keys.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.description: Implement a coordinated incident handling capability covering preparation, detection and analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.description: Require personnel to report suspected incidents within defined timeframes and report incident information to designated authorities.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system, analyze results, and remediate legitimate vulnerabilities within risk-based timeframes.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Monitor and control communications at external and key internal boundaries of the system using mechanisms such as firewalls and gateways.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Implement approved cryptography to protect the confidentiality and integrity of information in accordance with applicable laws and standards.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest, for example through encryption or cryptographic mechanisms.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct system flaws, test patches before installation, and install security-relevant updates within defined timeframes.

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor the system to detect attacks, indicators of potential attacks, and unauthorized connections, and identify unauthorized use of the system.
